questions.title: Clinical Assessment - Pain Management
questions.question_text: Describe your approach to assessing a patient presenting with pain management
expected_points: Assess pain management using appropriate assessment tools
Monitor vital signs and observations specific to pain management
Implement evidence-based interventions for pain management
Document findings and care provided
Escalate concerns appropriately in oncology setting
